index.heroTitle: Smart Image Editing, As Simple As You Imagine
index.heroDescription: WisePic is a powerful image editing tool that provides core features like cropping, rotation, filters, basic adjustments, compression, and format conversion, making your image processing easy and efficient.
index.feature1Desc: Supports multiple aspect ratios, intelligently recognizes image subjects, and crops out the best composition with one click.
index.feature2Desc: Rotate at any angle, flip horizontally or vertically, and easily adjust image orientation.
index.feature3Desc: Built-in dozens of exquisite filters, apply with one click to instantly enhance image quality.
index.feature4Desc: Fine-tune brightness, contrast, saturation, sharpness, and more to meet professional needs.
index.feature5Desc: Efficiently compress image size while maintaining quality and significantly reducing file size.
index.feature6Desc: Supports mutual conversion between various formats such as JPG, PNG, WEBP, and GIF.
index.downloadText: Currently available on Android, iOS version coming soon
index.downloadNote: *On Android, tapping this will try to open the app store details page first.
index.footerTagline: Making image editing simpler and smarter.

dataDeletion.title: Google Play Data Deletion
dataDeletion.subtitle: This page explains Google Play data deletion compliance. You can submit a deletion request by email.
dataDeletion.methodPrefix: If you want to delete personal data related to WisePic, please send your request to:
dataDeletion.item3: The scope of data you want deleted (for example, account data or usage records).
dataDeletion.processing: After receiving your request, we will verify identity and scope as soon as possible and reply with progress or result within 14 business days.
dataDeletion.note1: Local photos, cache, and exported files on your device can be deleted directly by you.
dataDeletion.note2: If laws or regulations require retention of certain information, we will handle and retain it only within the legally required scope and explain it to you.
